blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,174 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 27".
